title: Junior Frontend Developer at PhonePe South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at PhonePe South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
